===Pokémon===
[[File:Iris Party.png|thumb|250px|Iris's [[party]] in ''[[Pokémon the Series: Black & White]]'']]
Despite Iris aiming to be a [[Type expert|Dragon Master]], only a little more than half of her [[party]] are {{type|Dragon}} {{OBP|Pokémon|species}}, and [[Iris's Excadrill|her first one]] is not. Like {{Ash}}, she tends to {{pkmn2|caught|catch}} Pokémon she befriends or wants to travel with her regardless of their [[type]], as shown when she wanted to add an {{AP|Oshawott}} and a {{AP|Tepig}} on her team before both decided to stay with Ash. None of Iris's Pokémon were caught in battle, as they were either given to her or decided to go with her willingly.

For various reasons, most of Iris's Pokémon, Excadrill, {{TP|Iris|Emolga}}, and {{TP|Iris|Dragonite}}, showed signs of [[Obedience|disobedience]] in battles. However, Iris was eventually able to work past these issues and earn their full cooperation.

This listing is of Iris's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
